fileContext.overview: LocalProvider is a class that connects to OpenAI-compatible local inference servers for text completion tasks, supporting early termination and cancellation.

symbols.name: LocalProvider
symbols.purpose: Connects to OpenAI-compatible local inference servers for text completion tasks
symbols.behavior: Supports early termination and cancellation, handles different server types and error cases
symbols.limitations: Requires OpenAI-compatible local inference server, may not work with all server types

symbols.name: complete
symbols.purpose: Completes text based on input messages
symbols.behavior: Makes a POST request to the server, handles errors and cancellation, returns LLMResponse
symbols.limitations: May throw LLMError or RateLimitError, requires OpenAI-compatible local inference server

symbols.name: readStream
symbols.purpose: Reads an SSE stream from the server
symbols.behavior: Tracks JSON brace depth, handles early termination and cancellation, returns LLMResponse
symbols.limitations: May throw DOMException or LLMError, requires SSE stream from server

symbols.name: readNonStreamingResponse
symbols.purpose: Reads a non-streaming response from the server
symbols.behavior: Handles different response formats, returns LLMResponse
symbols.limitations: May throw LLMError, requires non-streaming response from server
